message.body: Echo_Mask is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: Christmas 2 (Secret Santa Games 2025) - Day 4

i tile everything i make and its easy as hell...

i have absolutely used those before
as a matter of fact i had to do so in some revised stages in dldc
creator needs to go to tiling school
kale's setup got in the way of him doing the jump
you know you made a good stage when you are using 5 depth layers to make your visuals look good
he plays with the numpad keys cuz hes a fucking weirdo, so up and down are pure finger spaghetti
yeah but the one key of distance between up and down makes a lot of difference
for sth more tricky like your stage, you can't be as snappy with the movement and it takes longer to get used to
those are always the ones that have arrows
i dont even wanna know what plasma would go through playing that on a mouse...
cant you just cancel the fireball
I don't think you have to be upside down to exit the screen
either by pressing jump or shoot
its part of the gimmick lol
thats really weird, i cant tell if they changed that or ren just had it like this on older versions of his engine
I think it had it like this
remember when this game was easy...
this is def not how its supposed to work lol
hmm... yes you're supposed to slay!

and there's no way to flip back down?

If you have green poop you might have some problems in the guts
like literally what you just tried to do
like u grab green on ur way up from blue
all is fair in puzzle warfare
ok well you need blue for that lol
it was a long way up

when in doubt, more speed and yeet
you can keep coming back to this statement
there is a lot of player freedom, chances are there are like 20 solutions to do this right
also a little hint, when yeeting you want to dash before you doublejump because youll have higher speed for more time
automatic dashing does not give speed
the spike placement tends to give you a pretty good hint
like those gaps almost definitely mean you want to dash through them horizontally
probably coming from the right and going back through it after bouncing on that wall
ive never done this save i think
tell me how much backseating you want btw
if you had done the extra dash with that first dash refresher you would have had enough speed
